terms.docTitle: Terms and Conditions of Use of the "ShootHA" App (ShootHA) — For players
terms.introBody: By using the "ShootHA" app, you agree to comply with the following terms and conditions. This agreement is a legal contract between you (referred to as the "User" or "Player") and the operator of the "ShootHA" app.
terms.sec1a: The "ShootHA" app is a technical intermediary that facilitates booking sports pitches and electronic payments.
terms.sec1b: The app operator is not responsible for pitch surface quality, lighting, or in-pitch facilities; the "venue owner" bears full responsibility for these.
terms.sec2a: A booking is not confirmed until electronic payment completes successfully and you receive an in-app confirmation notice.
terms.sec2b: The player must pay the advertised booking amount, including any service fees and applicable taxes.
terms.sec2c: Arrive at the pitch at least 10 minutes before kick-off to avoid losing booking time.
terms.sec3EarlyBody: The player may cancel the booking and receive a full refund if cancellation occurs at least 24 hours before the scheduled match time.
terms.sec3LateBody: If you cancel between 6 and 12 hours before the match, only 50% of the booking value is refunded, as compensation to the venue for holding the slot.
terms.sec3NoShowBody: If the team does not attend and 15 minutes have passed from the scheduled start, the full amount paid is forfeited and the player has no right to a refund.
terms.sec3VenueBody: If the venue cancels the booking for technical reasons, the app will refund the full amount to the player’s wallet or offer an alternative slot, at the user’s choice.
terms.sec4InjBody: The "ShootHA" app is not liable for bodily injury, accidents, or death that may occur during play or within the venue premises.
terms.sec4PropBody: The app is not responsible for loss or theft of personal items (phones, wallets, keys) inside sports facilities.
terms.sec4CondBody: The venue may eject any team for misconduct or damage to property; the team is not entitled to a booking refund in that case.
terms.sec5a: You are responsible for keeping your account credentials and linked phone number confidential.
terms.sec5b: The operator of "ShootHA" may suspend any account proven to abuse the system or use unlawful payment methods.
terms.sec6Body: If a dispute arises between a player and a venue owner (start time or service quality), the app operator may arbitrate based on digital system records.
